    Class CurveBuilder<T>

    Represents an editable curve of T elements.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Animations
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public abstract class CurveBuilder<T> : ICurveSampler<T>, IConvertibleCurve<T> where T : struct
    Type Parameters
    T

    An element of the curve.

    Name Description
    CurveBuilder()
    CurveBuilder(CurveBuilder<T>)

    Properties

    Name Description
    Keys
    MaxDegree

    Gets a value indicating the maximum degree of the curve, current values are: 0: STEP. 1: LINEAR. 3: CUBIC.
